reason: Check the final change preserves the global RVV-first authority chain and Stage1/Stage2 boundaries.
Check RVV plugin-local ownership, selected-body realization, route-provider derivation, and legacy fail-closed policy.
Check common EmitC/export did not become RVV semantic or LMUL/intrinsic authority.
Check runtime ABI roles remain envelope declarations consumed by typed RVV body structure.
Check LMUL/SEW/dtype/capability/runtime facts remain layered and structural.
Check any RVV executable correctness claim includes real ssh rvv evidence.
Check metadata, route ids, and emission mirrors are not used as route or config authority.
Check focused positive/negative tests and RVV runtime evidence match the touched behavior.
